options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: <delayCornerName>
options.description: Name of the delay calculation corner to query

options.name: -early_irdrop_data
options.description: Returns the list of IR drop files or directories applied to early delay calculation for this delay corner object

options.name: -early_irdrop_file
options.description: Returns the list of IR drop files applied when calculating early arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -early_library_set
options.description: Returns the library set associated with this delay corner object for calculating early arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -early_opcond
options.description: Returns the operating condition name used for calculating early arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -early_opcond_library
options.description: Returns the internal library name for the library in which the early operating condition is defined. This is not the library file name

options.name: -early_rc_corner
options.description: Returns the RC corner object associated with this delay corner object

options.name: -early_temp_file
options.description: Returns the temperature filename for temperature aware delay calculation for early corner

options.name: -irdrop_data
options.description: Returns the list of IR drop files or directories applied to both early and late delay calculation for this delay corner object

options.name: -irdrop_file
options.description: Returns the list of IR drop files applied to both early and late delay calculation for this delay corner object

options.name: -late_irdrop_data
options.description: Returns the list of IR drop files or directories applied to late delay calculation for this delay corner object

options.name: -late_irdrop_file
options.description: Returns the list of IR drop files applied when calculating late arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -late_library_set
options.description: Returns the library set associated with this delay corner object for calculating late arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -late_opcond
options.description: Returns the operating condition name used for calculating late arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -late_opcond_library
options.description: Returns the internal library name for the library in which the late operating condition is defined. This is not the library filename

options.name: -late_rc_corner
options.description: Returns the RC corner object associated with this delay corner object

options.name: -late_temp_file
options.description: Returns the temperature filename for temperature aware delay calculation for late corner

options.name: -library_set
options.description: Returns the library set associated with this delay corner object

options.name: -opcond
options.description: Returns the operating condition name used for setup and hold analysis

options.name: -opcond_library
options.description: Returns the internal library name for the library in which the operating condition is defined. This is not the library file name

options.name: -power_domain
options.description: name of the power domain you want to query

options.name: -power_domain_list
options.description: Returns a list of all power domains associated with the specified delay calculation corner

options.name: -rc_corner
options.description: Returns the RC corner object associated with this delay corner object

options.name: -si_enabled
options.description: Returns option to control SI behavior

options.name: -supply_set
options.description: name of the supply set you want to query

options.name: -supply_set_list
options.description: Returns a list of all supply sets associated with the specified delay calculation corner

options.name: -temp_file
options.description: Returns the temperature filename for temperature aware delay calculation for single corner
